_doc: Canonical signals × expected model_class. Used by test_golden_routing.py to detect drift in routing behavior. Pass threshold: >= 0.80 of cases must match. Update intentionally when ranker or routing_table changes.
_changelog: 2026-06-03: Catalog source switched from the hand-made 12-model snapshot to the full ai-tracker export (44 models, current pricing, real benchmarks). Expected classes widened where the richer catalog makes cheaper capable models legitimate winners: deepseek-v4-flash / gemini-3.5-flash / codestral / llama-3.2 now win cost-weighted picks they couldn't before (they weren't in the old snapshot). All high-stakes + provider-constrained production cases (pr-gate, cross-model-check, fakematt-copyedit) still pick opus/gpt-5.5-pro unchanged.

2026-06-03 (later, Matt approved): DESIGN DECISION RESOLVED — high-stakes is now whitelist-FIRST in ranker.py. When any whitelisted-class model (opus / gpt-5.5-pro / gpt-5-pro) survives hard filters, only whitelisted models compete at high-stakes; cheap perfect-tag-fit reasoners (deepseek-r1) no longer win on cost. Falls back to the open field when provider constraints exclude every whitelisted class. The brainstorm-high-stakes case reverted to expecting opus/gpt-5.5-pro.

cases.name: fakematt-email draft-prose medium
cases._why_widened: 2026-06-03: gemini-3.5-flash (balanced + cheap + fast) is a correct cost-optimized pick at medium floor. Production email drafting uses high-stakes + anthropic-only and is unaffected.

cases.name: fakematt-slack draft-prose cheap-ok
cases._why_widened: 2026-06-03: deepseek-v4-flash ($0.14/$0.28 per Mtok) is the cheapest capable pick — correct at cheap-ok.

cases.name: consultant-engagement brainstorm high-stakes
cases._note: 2026-06-03: whitelist-first at high-stakes — only opus/gpt-5.5-pro compete here.

cases.name: content-production structured-extract cheap-ok
cases._why_widened: 2026-06-03: deepseek-v4-flash matches all structured-extract tags and is cheapest.

cases.name: summarize large doc
cases._why_widened: 2026-06-03: deepseek-v4-flash is the cheapest long-context summarizer.

cases.name: classify small input
cases._why_widened: 2026-06-03: hosted llama-3.2-11b is a legitimate bottom-dollar classify pick at cheap-ok.

cases.name: sql query construction
cases._why_widened: 2026-06-03: codestral/qwen-coder/codex are true code-SQL specialists (perfect tag fit) the old snapshot didn't have. Better routing than before.

cases.name: draft-prose with cost budget forces cheaper
cases._why_widened: 2026-06-03: gemini-3.5-flash fits the $0.005 budget with writing capability.

cases.name: vision-required modality
cases._why_widened: 2026-06-03: gemini-3.5-flash is the multimodal value pick at medium floor.

cases.name: refute with anthropic active prefers openai/google
brainstorm cheap-ok
cases._why_widened: 2026-06-03: deepseek-r1 (pure reasoning specialist, cheap) is the textbook cheap-ok brainstorm pick.
